nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Candida Bombicola/Salix Alba Bark/(Prunus Mume/Garcinia Cambogia Fruit)(Morus Alba/Peach Leaf)/Sophora Japonica Root/Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil/Glycerin Ferment Extract Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Candida Bombicola/Salix Alba Bark/(Prunus Mume/Garcinia Cambogia Fruit)(Morus Alba/Peach Leaf)/Sophora Japonica Root/Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil/Glycerin Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil (q.v.), Glycerin (q.v.), the bark of Salix alba; the fruit of Prunus mume and Garcinia cambogia; the leaves of Morus alba and Prunus persica (peach); the roots of Sophora japonica, by the microorganism, Candida bombicola.
inciName: CANDIDA BOMBICOLA/SALIX ALBA BARK/(PRUNUS MUME/GARCINIA CAMBOGIA FRUIT)(MORUS ALBA/PEACH LEAF)/SOPHORA JAPONICA ROOT/MACADAMIA TERNIFOLIA SEED OIL/GLYCERIN FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
